questions.question: What TV show featured the iconic main character Michael Scott?
What was the name of popular soft, plush dolls with terrycloth mouths that sang and made noises when squeezed?
Which single by Lil Nas X (ft Billy Ray Cyrus) broke Billboard records in 2019?
In 2011 what terrorist was killed in Pakistan as a result of an American top-secret raid on his compound?
What was the phrase "Ok Boomer" used to imply?
questions.answer: That the Baby Boomer said something stupid.
